note: Witnessed pre-prompts over the REAL book plus explicit bridge topics. observer.assumed_ground is the chapters the learner has done; emphasis biases which ready chapter is next. mode 'teach' has a grounded instrument; mode 'bridge' attaches a sourced external substrate; mode 'prove' does not yet (honest gap = the proof-gap campaign, not wired).

goals.objective: Bring a newcomer in at the door of the book.
For a reader who has the room-at-zero and refinement, go to the medium.
Discharge an unproved claim in the next chapter.
Attach FabricPC as a sourced predictive-coding substrate for pedagogy and future experiments.

goals.topic_title: One schema, two instances: Lorentz-force equivariance and forcing persistence
goals.objective: Teach the Lean PS vertical slice: the shared commuting interface, the proved physics instance, the conditional reflection with its countermodel, and why the domains are not identified.

goals.topic_title: Book Five: verified persistence, memory, reciprocity, and fracture
goals.objective: Teach Book Five from the generated Lean coverage while preserving conditional laws, partial coverage, and authored interpretation.
